name: ReDertsy
short_description: The protagonist is stranded in an enigmatic realm, and it's your task to aid them in navigating through the intricacies of time. Rescue our hero by gathering the maximum number of eggs!
detailed_description:
ReDertsy is an exhilarating speedrun game where your goal is to collect as many eggs as possible. Use the W, A, S, and D keys to maneuver your character and activate the Sprint ability with the Shift key.

Immerse yourself in a variety of unique musical experiences as you traverse through the game's distinct atmosphere.

If you're seeking to set the best time in a one-of-a-kind atmosphere while enjoying a relaxing gameplay experience, then ReDertsy is the perfect choice for you.
